rankings.india_relevance: Examines a structural shift in how Indian business families manage wealth and succession.
rankings.why_it_matters: Reveals changing strategies for legacy planning and capital preservation among India's largest private capital pools, affecting corporate control.

rankings.title: Fertiliser supplies may turn tight by May - The Financial Express
rankings.india_relevance: Forecasts a shortage affecting Indian agriculture within weeks.
rankings.why_it_matters: Warns of an impending crunch in a critical farm input, threatening crop yields, food prices, and rural stability ahead of the Kharif season.

rankings.title: Services sectors feel ripple effects as West Asia crisis hits operations
rankings.india_relevance: Broadly assesses war impact beyond manufacturing to India's services economy.
rankings.why_it_matters: Highlights vulnerability of IT, tourism, logistics, and other service sectors to geopolitical disruption, affecting a major part of GDP.

rankings.title: Indian edtech startup upGrad plans to acquire rival Unacademy in an all-stock deal; Unacademy was valued at less than $500M in 2025, down from $3.5B in 2021 (Jagmeet Singh/TechCrunch)
rankings.india_relevance: Major consolidation in India's battered edtech sector.
rankings.why_it_matters: Signals a desperate phase of sector shakeout, marking the fall of a former unicorn and potential creation of a distressed mega-player.

rankings.title: Govt extends localisation deadline for EV bus, truck motors under PM E-Drive scheme
rankings.india_relevance: Shows policy adaptation to supply chain realities in a key Indian industry.
rankings.why_it_matters: Indicates the government acknowledging hurdles in its EV manufacturing push, offering relief but also delaying self-reliance goals.

rankings.title: US waiver opens door for Russian oil to India - The Financial Express
rankings.india_relevance: Details a specific policy change enabling continued Indian oil imports from Russia.
rankings.why_it_matters: Shows how the US accommodates India's energy needs amid war, a crucial exception that helps control India's import bill.

rankings.title: Iran War Catapults Asia to the Frontline of a Global Energy Crisis - Bloomberg.com
rankings.india_relevance: Positions India/Asia as the epicenter of the energy shock's impact.
rankings.why_it_matters: Provides a macro-framework explaining why this crisis disproportionately affects Asia's growth engines, including India.
